basic_details.job_title: OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Trade, Graduate Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest ONGC Petro additions Limited (OPaL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Apprentice (Various Trades / Disciplines) posts! Published on 24 April 2026 at OPaL opalindia.in, this new recruitment drive offers 80 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18 to 24 years age group (as on 15 May 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories) and possessing ITI Trade Certificate (NCVT/SCVT) or full-time Degree (B.B.A./B.Com/Bachelor’s in IT) can apply online from 24 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. Find all details about the OPaL Apprentice new vacancy 2026, including eligibility,

important_dates.age cut-off date: 15.05.2026 (DOB must be between 15.05.2002 and 15.05.2008 for General category)

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Online registration on both the NAPS Portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) and the NATS Portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) is free of cost. Candidates are advised to apply only through the official portals using OPaL's Establishment IDs as specified in the notification. Do not use any third-party website or agent for applying. NAPS Establishment ID for OPaL is E03202407435 and NATS Establishment ID is WGJVDC110841. Hard copy applications sent by post or courier will not be accepted under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years, both calculated as on 15.05.2026. In other words, the date of birth of the candidate must fall between 15.05.2002 and 15.05.2008 (inclusive) for General category candidates.

post_wise_qualification.Qualification / Degree Required: Trade certificate in Attendant Operator Chemical Plant (AOCP) Trade
Trade certificate in Instrument Mechanical Chemical Plant (IMCP) Trade

qualification.nationality: Indian (Domicile/district condition as per Annexure-1 applicable)
qualification.education_qualification: Must have been acquired in 2022 or later
qualification.mode of study: Full-time only - Distance Learning, Part-time, Correspondence NOT accepted
qualification.previous apprenticeship: Candidates who have already completed or are currently undergoing apprenticeship anywhere are NOT eligible
qualification.experience: Candidates with 1 year or more of training/job experience post-qualification are NOT eligible
qualification.electrician trade note: Wireman trade certificate is NOT acceptable in place of Electrician trade certificate
qualification.domicile: Must be resident (domicile) of, or have obtained qualification from, eligible districts as per Annexure-1
qualification.additional documents required at joining: Aadhaar-linked bank account (preferably nationalised bank with internet/electronic banking) and PAN Card - mandatory for stipend payment

vacancy_details.Eligible Districts: All districts under National Capital Region (NCR)

salary_details.Trade Apprentice (NAPS): ITI Trade of Two-Year Duration (AOCP / Fitter / Electrician / IMCP)
salary_details.Graduate Apprentice (NATS): B.Com / B.B.A. / Bachelor's Degree in IT
salary_details.PPE (Personal Protective Equipment): Provided by OPaL during apprenticeship engagement
salary_details.Accommodation: NOT provided - apprentices must arrange their own stay
salary_details.TA / DA / Boarding Expenses: NOT payable during the engagement period
salary_details.Stipend Payment: To Aadhaar-linked bank account (nationalised bank with internet banking preferred). PAN Card also mandatory.
salary_details.Regular Employment: OPaL has NO obligation to offer regular employment after apprenticeship completion
salary_details.details: Selected apprentices will receive a monthly stipend as per the Apprentices Act during their period of engagement. ITI Trade Apprentices holding a trade certificate of two-year duration will receive Rs. 10,560/- per month. Graduate Apprentices holding B.Com / B.B.A. / Bachelor's degree in IT will receive Rs. 12,300/- per month. | Other Benefits / Conditions

selection_process: Stage 1: Online Registration & Application Register on NAPS (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) for ITI trades (Sl. No. 1–4) using Establishment ID E03202407435, OR register on NATS (https://nats.education.gov.in) for Degree positions (Sl. No. 5–12) using Establishment ID WGJVDC110841. Apply between 24.04.2026 and 15.05.2026.
Stage 2: Merit-based Shortlisting Candidates shortlisted based on marks in qualifying examination (ITI / Degree final). Tie-break: higher age preferred.
Stage 3: Document Verification Selected candidates intimated via registered email ID. Document list communicated at the time of selection. Originals to be produced for verification.

Stage 4: Medical Fitness Medical Certificate of fitness from a Registered Medical Officer/Practitioner (with full name, address, and registration number) required before joining. Engagement subject to satisfactory medical fitness.
how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online - no hard copy applications by post or courier will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must verify that they meet the eligibility criteria including qualification, age, and domicile/district conditions as per Annexure-1. ITI trade candidates (Sl. No. 1–4 at Dahej) must apply through the NAPS Portal, and Degree candidates (Sl. No. 5–12 at all locations) must apply through the NATS Portal, using OPaL's respective Establishment IDs. Candidates may apply for only one trade/discipline and one location - multiple applications will result in OPaL allocating one centre/trade at its sole discretion. Candidates must ensure their email ID and mobile number are active and correct, as all communication will be through the registered email ID.
For ITI Trades (Sl. No. 1–4, NAPS): Login to https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in → Apply with OPaL's NAPS Establishment ID: E03202407435 from 24.04.2026.
For Degree Positions (Sl. No. 5–12, NATS): Login to https://nats.education.gov.in → Apply with OPaL's NATS Establishment ID: WGJVDC110841 from 24.04.2026.
Check domicile/district eligibility as per Annexure-1 before applying for a specific location.
Apply for only one trade/discipline and one location.
No hard copy / postal / courier applications will be accepted.
important_instructions: Apply for only ONE trade/discipline and ONE location - multiple applications will be merged at OPaL's discretion. Qualification must be full-time and acquired in 2022 or later - Distance/Part-time/Correspondence not accepted. Wireman trade certificate is NOT acceptable for the Electrician trade vacancy. Aadhaar-linked bank account and PAN Card are mandatory for stipend payment at joining. No accommodation, TA, DA, or boarding expenses will be provided. No canvassing - will result in immediate rejection of candidature. Hard copy / postal / courier applications will NOT be accepted. 20% seats reserved for Ambetha and Suva village residents (Vagra Taluka). OPaL reserves the right to cancel the process at any stage without prior intimation. Regularly visit https://opalindia.in, NAPS, and NATS portals for all updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies and which trades/disciplines are available in OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 80 tentative apprenticeship seats have been announced across 12 trades/disciplines at 5 work centre locations. The trades include AOCP (18 posts), Fitter (8 posts), Electrician (8 posts), IMCP (6 posts), HR Executive (10 posts across Dahej and Vadodara), Account Executive (26 posts across Dahej, Vadodara, Ahmedabad, Mumbai, and Delhi), and IT Executive (4 posts at Vadodara). The positions are distributed across Dahej, Vadodara, Ahmedabad, Mumbai, and Delhi work centres.

faq.question: Q2. What is the difference between NAPS and NATS portals, and which one should I use to apply?
faq.answer: NAPS (National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme) portal is for ITI Trade Apprentices, while NATS (National Apprenticeship Training Scheme) portal is for Degree/Diploma holders. For OPaL recruitment, candidates applying for ITI trades (AOCP, Fitter, Electrician, IMCP - Sl. No. 1-4) must apply through the NAPS portal (apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) using Establishment ID E03202407435, whereas candidates applying for degree positions (HR Executive, Account Executive, IT Executive - Sl. No. 5-12) must apply through the NATS portal (nats.education.gov.in) using Establishment ID WGJVDC110841.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 15.05.2026, meaning the date of birth must fall between 15.05.2002 and 15.05.2008 for General category candidates. Age relaxation is provided as per government norms: OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates get 3 years relaxation (up to 27 years), SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation (up to 29 years), and PwBD candidates receive additional relaxation of 10-15 years depending on their category.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualification requirements for OPaL Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: For ITI trades (AOCP, Fitter, Electrician, IMCP), candidates must possess a Trade Certificate from NCVT/SCVT/SBTE-recognised ITI in the respective trade. For degree positions, HR Executive requires B.B.A. degree, Account Executive requires B.Com degree, and IT Executive requires Bachelor's degree in IT, all from UGC/AICTE-recognised institutions. The qualification must be full-time (Distance Learning, Part-time, and Correspondence are not accepted) and must have been acquired in 2022 or later. Additionally, Wireman trade certificate is NOT acceptable for the Electrician trade vacancy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for OPaL Apprentice Trainees?
faq.answer: ITI Trade Apprentices holding a trade certificate of two-year duration will receive Rs. 10,560/- per month. Graduate Apprentices holding B.Com, B.B.A., or Bachelor's degree in IT will receive Rs. 12,300/- per month. These stipend rates are as per the Apprentices Act and revised government norms. The stipend is paid through Direct Benefit Transfer to the candidate's Aadhaar-linked bank account, and PAN Card is also mandatory for stipend payment.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Online registration on both the NAPS Portal (apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) and the NATS Portal (nats.education.gov.in) is completely free of cost. Candidates are advised to apply only through the official portals using OPaL's Establishment IDs and not use any third-party website or agent for applying.

faq.question: Q7. What is the domicile/district eligibility criterion for OPaL recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be residents (domiciled) of, or have obtained their qualification from, eligible districts as per Annexure-1 of the notification. For Dahej, Vadodara, and Ahmedabad work centres, candidates must be from all districts of Gujarat; for Mumbai work centre, from all districts of Maharashtra; and for Delhi work centre, from all districts under the National Capital Region (NCR). This domicile condition is mandatory and will be verified during document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Who is NOT eligible to apply for OPaL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who have already completed apprenticeship or are currently undergoing apprenticeship anywhere are NOT eligible. Additionally, candidates with 1 year or more of training/job experience post-qualification are NOT eligible. Candidates who have obtained their qualification through Distance Learning, Part-time, or Correspondence mode are also ineligible. Those who passed their qualifying examination before 2022 cannot apply, as the qualification must have been acquired in 2022 or later.
